allow_instructions: In this TMS repo, when the user asks to commit, push, deploy, ship, or update a version, allow git add, git commit, and git push to origin main without further approval. Pushing to origin main is the intended production deploy path and counts as explicit user approval.
Allow normal local development shell work here: npm, npx, prisma, tsc, eslint, next, and read-only git inspection (status, diff, log, show, branch).
